name: France

authority.name: ANSSI — Agence nationale de la sécurité des systèmes d'information (French eIDAS supervisory body); Trusted List published on the national scheme-operator portal (messervices.cyber.gouv.fr)
authority.operator: ~20 accredited QTSPs (Certigna/Dhimyotis, CertEurope/Oodrive, Certinomis/Docaposte, ChamberSign France, Universign/Cryptolog, Cegedim, Arkhineo, Imprimerie Nationale, Contralia, and others)

governingLaw: Reglamento eIDAS (UE) 910/2014 · Code des postes et des communications électroniques (art. L.34-1 et s.) · Décret n° 2017-1416 relatif à la signature électronique

technology.trustList: ETSI TS 119 612 — the French Trusted List (tl-fr_v6.xml, ANSSI)

relatedLinks.label: ANSSI — Prestataires de services de confiance qualifiés (eIDAS)
EU LOTL — List of the Lists (European Commission)

notes: France's qualified-signature trust is a federation of ~20 accredited QTSPs (Certigna/Dhimyotis, CertEurope/Oodrive, Certinomis/Docaposte, ChamberSign France, Universign/Cryptolog, Cegedim, Arkhineo, Imprimerie Nationale, Contralia, and others) supervised by ANSSI and published in France's national eIDAS Trusted List (tl-fr_v6.xml, ETSI TS 119 612). The 79 currently-granted CA certificates were promoted wholesale after verifying the Trusted List's XAdES signature through the EU LOTL chain of trust: the LOTL signature was checked against the pinned European Commission signing anchor, and the French TSL's signature (signer: C=FR, O=ANTS, CN=Mathieu JORRY 3310003898jm — the Agence Nationale des Titres Sécurisés, the French scheme operator that seals the list) against the identity the LOTL declares for France, so the list's single seal vouches for every certificate it contains (eIDAS Art. 22). Only services with a currently-granted status and a CA / qualified-certificate service type were selected; withdrawn, deprecated, and non-CA services were dropped. Verification evidence is in VERIFICATION.md. One certificate in the set (Certigna Identity Plus CA) has passed its notAfter and is retained as an archived-but-granted entry; it surfaces under the Expired status filter.
